channel.title: Vienna Public Transport — Disruptions & Commuter Info
channel.description: Active disruptions, construction works and restrictions from official sources (Wiener Linien, ÖBB, VOR/VAO, City of Vienna).

item.title: 12A/13A/14A2X/33A/5A/5B/65A/77A/80A/94A: traffic congestion0X
item.description: irregular intervals in both directions. Line 5A: irregular intervals in both directions. [On 03.06.2026]
item.content:encoded:
irregular intervals in both directions. Line 5A: irregular intervals in both directions.
[On 03.06.2026]

item.title: 62: track damage Operation only up to Bhf. Meidling Dörfelstr., from Bhf. Meidling Dörfelstraße
item.description: track damage operation only up to Bhf. Meidling <> Dörfelstr. track damage service from Bhf. Meidling <> Dörfelstraße [On 03.06.2026]
item.content:encoded:
track damage operation only up to Bhf. Meidling <> Dörfelstr. track damage service from Bhf. Meidling <> Dörfelstraße
[On 03.06.2026]

item.title: 35A: traffic congestion
item.description: irregular intervals in both directions. Reason: traffic congestion in the stop area Nußdorfer Straße U. [On 03.06.2026]
item.content:encoded:
irregular intervals in both directions. Reason: traffic congestion in the stop area Nußdorfer Straße U.
[On 03.06.2026]

item.title: 18: service disruption
item.description: After an service obstruction there are different intervals. [On 03.06.2026]
item.content:encoded:
After an service obstruction there are different intervals.
[On 03.06.2026]

item.title: 6: service disruption
item.description: After an service obstruction there are different intervals. [On 03.06.2026]
item.content:encoded:

[On 03.06.2026]

item.title: 47A/N54: diversion direction Unter St. Veit or Westbahnhof
item.description: Because of construction works in the range Hietzinger Kai / Baumgartenbrücke, an diversion is set up. [03.06.2026 – 18.06.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Because of construction works in the range Hietzinger Kai / Baumgartenbrücke, an diversion is set up.
[03.06.2026 – 18.06.2026]

item.title: U2: Facade exchange Sation Seestadt
item.description: Due to construction works in the station area Seestadt, the exit tracks are blocked alternately. [03.06.2026 – 20.06.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Due to construction works in the station area Seestadt, the exit tracks are blocked alternately.
[03.06.2026 – 20.06.2026]

item.title: 1/1A/22X/2A/31/3A/59A/71/74A/D: Rainbow Parade 2026 on 1306.2026
item.description: Because of the rainbow parade, the following traffic measures are taking place. [03.06.2026 – 13.06.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Because of the rainbow parade, the following traffic measures are taking place.
[03.06.2026 – 13.06.2026]

item.title: 7A: foreign traffic accident
item.description: After an service obstruction there are different intervals. [On 03.06.2026]
item.content:encoded:
After an service obstruction there are different intervals.
[On 03.06.2026]

item.title: 40A: traffic accident
